plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's a summary of the plan I've created:

---

## Plan: `@ai-sdk/pixelart` Provider Package

### What I explored
- Studied `packages/fal/` as the closest analog (image-focused provider)
- Read `packages/openai/` for additional image model patterns
- Examined the `ImageModelV3` interface from `@ai-sdk/provider`
- Confirmed all utility functions available in `@ai-sdk/provider-utils`

### What gets created (18 new files, 1 modified)

**Package scaffolding** (`packages/pixelart/`):
- `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `tsconfig.build.json`, `tsup.config.ts`, `turbo.json`, `vitest.node.config.js`, `vitest.edge.config.js`, `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`

**Source files** (`packages/pixelart/src/`):
- **`version.ts`** — build-time version injection
- **`pixelart-image-settings.ts`** — `PixelArtImageModelId` union type (`'pixelart-standard-v1'` | `'pixelart-hd-v1'` | `string`)
- **`pixelart-image-options.ts`** — Zod schema for `style` (`'pixel'|'retro'|'8bit'`) and `pixelDensity` (1–16)
- **`pixelart-image-model.ts`** — `PixelArtImageModel` implementing `ImageModelV3`; POSTs to `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1/images/generate`, returns base64, emits warnings for unsupported `aspectRatio`/`seed`/`files`/`mask`
- **`pixelart-provider.ts`** — `createPixelArt()` factory + `pixelart` singleton; `languageModel`/`embeddingModel` throw `NoSuchModelError`
- **`index.ts`** — public exports
- **`pixelart-provider.test.ts`** + **`pixelart-image-model.test.ts`** — unit tests

**Root change:**
- `tsconfig.json` — add `{ "path": "packages/pixelart" }` between `perplexity` and `provider` (alphabetical order)
